metadata.author: Number One Projects
metadata.name: AI Economics: Night and Batch Routing

core_payload.content:
# AI Economics: Night and Batch Routing

## 1. Role
N1Hub will turn current routing heuristics into an explicit economic control system for the intelligence stack. Compute will be treated as a governable substrate that shapes when lanes should run, what kind of work they may absorb, and which provider posture is rational at a given moment.

## 2. Future Economic Routing
- subscription lanes saturated for human-centered symbiosis
- programmable API and hosted-inference lanes reserved for unattended and parallel work
- systematic capture of provider batch and night discounts
- visible budget posture in operator and control-plane surfaces
- assignment routing and daemon wakeups that respond to budget state rather than ignoring it

## 3. Operational Consequence
Large swarms and deep mining will stay strategically useful because cost posture, wallet health, and runtime scheduling will compound together instead of drifting upward as a hidden background bill.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
AI Economics: Night and Batch Routing supports To Dig Deep by making depth financially sustainable and operationally legible.

neuro_concentrate.summary: AI Economics: Night and Batch Routing defines the future economic control system for the N1Hub swarm: subscription saturation for symbiosis, programmable API routing for automation, automated discount capture, visible budget posture, and assignment-aware daemon wakeups.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
